title: Greyshade family
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Greyshade family''' was a family of [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Politics/Legends|politicians]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Columex/Legends|Columex]]. Its members included [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Jheramahd Greyshade]] and his cousin, Senator [[Simon Greyshade/Legends|Simon Greyshade]], as well as [[Diedrich Greyshade]], a [[Moff/Legends|moff]] of the [[Commonality]].

==Family tree==
''Note: This pedigree chart assumes that the Greyshade's follow the tradition of keeping the male's surname during marriage.''

                  Unknown Greyshade--+--Unknown [[Gender/Legends|female]]
                                     |
                            +-----------------+
                            |                 |
 Unknown female--+--Unknown Greyshade Unknown Greyshade--+--Unknown female
                 |                                       |
                 +                                       +
                 |                                       |
        [[Jheramahd Greyshade]] [[Simon Greyshade/Legends|Simon Greyshade]]
